name: New York Stock Exchange
description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) is an American stock exchange in the Financial District of Lower Manhattan in New York City. It is the world's largest stock exchange by market capitalization of its listed companies. Owned by Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the NYSE provides a premier marketplace for buying and selling equities, exchange-traded funds, and other financial instruments, combining advanced electronic trading technology with a historic physical trading floor.
